When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-uc-micro as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-uc-micro with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-uc-micro --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
